turns.content: I don't know why anyone would want to read what I write. There are so many better writers out there.
What makes you say that? Do people respond well when they read your work?
Sometimes. But I always assume they're just being nice. I can't tell if anything I make is actually good.

notes: Low self-esteem with external validation seeking
